basic_details.job_title: THSTI Senior Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
basic_details.short_information: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) Senior Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of THSTI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the THSTI Senior Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: By five years for SC/ST, three years for OBC, ten years for UR PwBD, thirteen years for OBC PwBD, fifteen years for SC/ST PwBD, up to five years for Central Government servants, to the extent of service rendered for Institute employees, up to the extent of service rendered in defence forces plus 3 years for Ex-servicemen (minimum 6 months attested service).

qualification.details: Senior Research Scientist : MD/ MS/ DNB or equivalent degree in Obstetrics and Gynecology / Pediatrics / Community Medicine from an MCI recognized university with at least five (5) years of post-qualification clinical research experience preferably in the domain of public health, community medicine or maternal and child health OR MDS or equivalent degree from a recognized university with at least six (6) years of post-qualification clinical research experience preferably in the domain of public health, community medicine or maternal and child health OR MBBS/ BDS or equivalent degree from a recognized university with at least eight (8) years of post-qualification clinical research experience in the domain of maternal and child health. Desirable: Demonstrated leadership in clinical research or trials, particularly maternal-child health or multi-site RCTs; Experience in developing and implementing trial monitoring, safety, and quality assurance plans; Familiarity with IRB/ethics submissions, regulatory requirements, and amendment processes; Working knowledge of ICH-GCP and national guidelines; Authorship of peer-reviewed publications; experience in manuscript preparation; Strong organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills; Ability to lead and motivate multi-disciplinary teams and manage competing priorities.
